parents.subject: LU-8602 gss: autoconf check missing "test" keyword

commit.subject: LU-9730 tests: obdfilter-survey cleanup upon exit/signal
commit.message:
LU-9730 tests: obdfilter-survey cleanup upon exit/signal

This patch is an attempt to fix multiple cases where echo objects
can be leaked upon obdfilter-survey exit/signal, in the tool/scripts
itself.

In addition, a way/tool, to clean all obdecho objects that have been
left on a device, must also be created.

Test-Parameters: testgroup=review testlist=obdfilter-survey
Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Change-Id: If0d96c177552b9e4306342186cdd60be8b0616e2
